category_sources: source_facts.description says it wraps ping output; official homepage describes prettyping as a wrapper around ping.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official project page both use prettyping.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project documentation/homepage with install, features, examples, and comparison.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/denilsonsa/prettyping; per instruction, not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says it colorizes and simplifies ping output; official homepage documents latency, packet loss, terminal colors, and ping wrapping.
